TimeEntry.Title: Gagan with BST is on call and needs assistance with his scans folder missing on his computer
TimeEntry.Notes:
• Issue: Received a call from Gagan (BST) regarding a missing scans folder on his computer.
  • Action Taken:
    • Connected to Gagan’s machine remotely to troubleshoot.
    • Verified that the scans folder was restored and accessible.
    • Checked VPN connection, confirmed that it was functioning correctly.
    • All systems were checked and confirmed operational.
  • Resolution: After troubleshooting, the issue was resolved, and the scans folder was accessible.
  • Confirmation: Ticket closed after confirming with Gagan that everything was functioning properly.

TimeEntry.Title: VPN issue
TimeEntry.Notes: Jeff had issues with VPN, AD server was down. Requested Jeff to turn on Server, after the discussions, jeff requested Tech heights to turn on server.  after that VPN is working.

TimeEntry.Title: VPN issue
TimeEntry.Notes: Discussed and verified with Rishad regarding the VPN issue and verified all the FSMO roles were assigned to BST-HQ-AD-01 server which was powered off by the tech heights. Once powered it on tested and confirmed its working fine.

TimeEntry.Title: Re: VPN
TimeEntry.Notes: As per Jeff’s email, connected to Jeff’s machine to check the issue. The user was unable to connect to the VPN. I verified all the troubleshooting steps on the user’s machine, but the issue persisted. Upon further checking on the server side, I found that the AD server was offline. I informed Rishad about the issue, and Rishad updated Jeff via email.

TimeEntry.Title: off boarding
TimeEntry.Notes:
disable this -  (Dov requested, jeff authorized ) 

Canusa Hershman is winding down operations of the ‘K2 Trading USA’ and its relationship with The Boston Group.

We have disabled the IPSec tunnel from our end; can you please remove the tunnel from the Boston Group’s side (98.174.159.42)?

TimeEntry.Title: AD system attack
TimeEntry.Notes: there was an phishing attempt on ad server, checked the files and sent mail to jeff and crowd strike.

TimeEntry.Title: BST-HQ-RA-01 has Missing patch while last run
TimeEntry.Notes:
I worked on the missing patches and logged into the ManageEngine portal to review the approved patches for the machines. I downloaded and manually installed the applicable failed patches.then no reboot require.Scanned the devices Some patches were not applicable due to compatibility issues. All previously missing patches were successfully updated.


Patches are 
Update for Microsoft 365 Apps for Enterprise Current Channel for x64 2603 of version(19822.20142)


Machines are :BST-HQ-RA-01

TimeEntry.Title: BST-HQ-LPT-01 & BG77 : Manually patch update as APD couldn't execute
TimeEntry.Notes:
BST-HQ-LPT-01 :

  • 2026-01 Cumulative Update Preview for .NET Framework 3.5 and 4.8.1 (KB5074828) applied.
  • 2026-03 Cumulative Update for Windows 11 version 25H2 (KB5086672, build 26200.8117) installed.
  • Realtek High Definition Audio driver [INTELAUDIO\FUNC_01&VEN_10EC&DEV_0289] (6.0.9932.1) updated.
  • Intel UHD Graphics (Raptor Lake-P) driver [PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_A7A8] (32.0.101.7082) updated.
  • Raptor Lake PCH CNVi WiFi driver [PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_51F1] (24.20.0.4) updated.

BG77 – Wireless-AC 9560 driver PCI\\VEN_8086&DEV_7AF0 (24.20.0.4) verified for compatibility.

Verified that all the above patches are updated in the MyRMM database.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Performed Weekly Firewall Backup for BST:- FortiGate 100F
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the BST:- FortiGate 100F. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Monthly Switch Backup for BST 10.1.1.252 and 10.1.1.253
TimeEntry.Notes: Accessed BST 10.1.1.252 and 10.1.1.253 switch using putty and performed configuration backup. placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network- config-Switch folder. Hence, closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Manage-Engine Latest version updated 11.5.2600.32.W - BST-HQ-VONE, BST-HQ-RG-01, BST-HQ-RA-01, BG61
TimeEntry.Notes: Manage-Engine Latest version updated 11.5.2600.32.W - BST-HQ-VONE, BST-HQ-RG-01, BST-HQ-RA-01, BG61

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version ( 7.35.20709.0) updated on, BG77,BOSTON-KEVINJR,BST-HQ-OPSPRB,BST-HQ-VBR-01
TimeEntry.Notes: After checking the CrowdStrike portal, I found that  Crowdstrike latest version updated Crowdstrike latest version updated on, BG77,BOSTON-KEVINJR,BST-HQ-OPSPRB,BST-HQ-VBR-01  needed updates. I updated both to version 7.35.20709.0

TimeEntry.Title: Manual Update Required: Cisco Secure Client v5.1.16.194 on BST-HQ-FS-02
TimeEntry.Notes:
After reviewing the management portal, it has been identified that the following systems require manual updates:

BST-HQ-FS-02

Cisco Secure Client & AnyConnect VPN (Version 5.1.16.194) requires manual installation on these devices. Remote access will be utilized to download and install the necessary setup files on the affected systems.
Once the installation is complete, a scan will be initiated through the management portal to verify that the systems are updated to the latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Screenconnect Latest version (v 26.1.25.9592) update: - KEVIN2, DESKTOP-QPBGLP8, BG77, BG61
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked and found that the devices (KEVIN2, DESKTOP-QPBGLP8, BG77, BG61) were running an outdated version of Screen Connect. I initiated the update for these devices from the portal, but unable to update, I noticed some issues when verifying the version on the portal. connected to the machines through My Rmm and uninstall the screen connect software. after that download and install the fresh My Remote setup and install on it and verify that agents have been updated successfully with the latest version (v 26.1.25.9592)Hence closing the ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Screenconnect Latest version (V 26.1.25.9592 ) updated on machine BST-HQ-APP-01,BST-HQ-APP-01, BST-HQ-VONE & BST-HQ-VBR-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked and found that the computers machine BST-HQ-APP-01,BST-HQ-APP-01, BST-HQ-VONE & BST-HQ-VBR-01  were running an old version of ScreenConnect. update the software from the portal to the new version V 26.1.25.9592. After updating, verify that the version on the portal has been successfully updated to the latest version. Hence Closing this ticket .

TimeEntry.Title: Missing and failed patch update on the systems:- Boston-KevinJR
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login to the manage engine portal and check approved patches for the below mentioned machine then download and installed. connected to the machine through MY RMM and installed the failed patches manually which are applicable to the computer. Then reboot the machine and scan the machine for installed patches. After scan Check and verify the machine with the MY RMM portal. The failed patches are updated successfully.

Machine is: - Boston-KevinJR

Patch installed: - 1319344  TigerLake-LP GT2 [Iris Xe Graphics][PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_9A49] (32.0.101.7079)

112989 2026-01 Cumulative Update for Windows 10 Version 22H2 for x64-based Systems (KB5078129) (ESU)

1319958 Wi-Fi 6 AX201[PCI\\VEN_8086&DEV_A0F0] (24.20.0.4)

TimeEntry.Title: Performed Weekly Firewall Backup for BST:- FortiGate 100F
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the BST:- FortiGate 100F. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket....

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version 0.14.162, replaced with Version 0.14.150 on BST-HQ-FS-02, BST-HQ-VBR-01, BST-HQ-RA-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Huntress Agent updated with Version 0.14.162, replaced with Version 0.14.150 on BST-HQ-FS-02, BST-HQ-VBR-01, BST-HQ-RA-01

TimeEntry.Title: Lisa Jack e-mail password
TimeEntry.Notes: Received an email request from Jeff to share the password for user Lisa Jack, as the password was lost. Checked the user’s password in Passportal and verified the email credentials, which were working and required MFA after login. The password was shared with Jeff in an encrypted format.

TimeEntry.Title: password reset
TimeEntry.Notes: reset user password few user (kevin and another user) -requested by jeff

TimeEntry.Title: ScreenConnect Remote Support updated with Latest Version 26.1.25.9592 on BST-HQ-RG-01, BST-HQ-RA-01, BST-HQ-FS-02, BST-HQ-FS-01
TimeEntry.Notes: ScreenConnect Remote Support updated with Latest Version 26.1.25.9592 on BST-HQ-RG-01, BST-HQ-RA-01, BST-HQ-FS-02, BST-HQ-FS-01

TimeEntry.Title: Gagan with BST needs assistance there VPN
TimeEntry.Notes:
Ticket Summary:

  • Issue: VPN connectivity issue reported by Gagan from Boston Group.
  • Details:
    • Gagan reported that the VPN is unable to connect.
    • Connected to the user system to verify the issue – confirmed that the VPN is not working.
    • Verified the servers and found them inaccessible.
    • The firewall was also not accessible.
    • Disconnected from Gagan and reached out to the U.S. team (Pushad) for further verification.
    • Verified that all access has been transferred to Tech Heights (UID companies), which is now managing the servers and firewall.
    • Informed Gagan that he needs to contact Tech Heights for assistance, as we no longer have access to or manage the servers and firewall.
  • Action Taken: Informed Gagan and closed the ticket as the issue is outside of our control.

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Boston Group - Time-Sensitive Closeout Items (Reply Requested)
TimeEntry.Notes: Removed the probe from the OPS portal and deleted the customer as well and closed the all tickets related to OPS probe to avoid the false alerts.

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Boston Group - Time-Sensitive Closeout Items (Reply Requested)
TimeEntry.Notes:
As per received handover from pervious shift, Task Descriptions that are taken:

1. Disabling Tamper Protection in CrowdStrike:

  • Created a custom policy in CrowdStrike to disable tamper protection for all relevant machines.
  • Assigned the affected hosts to this new policy, ensuring that the tamper protection feature was turned off, allowing for easier uninstallation of the agents without any restrictions. Policy is applied to few machines and pending for few.

2. Removing Machines from Huntress:

  • Accessed the Huntress Portal and removed the affected machines from the platform. This process ensured that no more communication between the affected machines and the Huntress system would occur, facilitating a smooth uninstallation.

3. Removing Machines from Cisco Umbrella:

  • Logged into the Cisco Umbrella Portal and removed the affected devices. This step ensured that no security rules or configurations from Cisco Umbrella were applied to the machines during the uninstallation process, preventing any interference.

4. Disabling Protection in ManageEngine:

  • In the ManageEngine Admin Console, disabled tamper protection for all affected machines. This step allowed the uninstallation of the ManageEngine agents without requiring OTP or additional authentication.
  • The change was applied , and once the machines come online, the settings would be applied, enabling the uninstallation process.

5. Informing Jeff:

  • After successfully completing the actions above, I informed Jeff Klein that the tamper protection had been disabled in CrowdStrike, the machines had been removed from Huntress and Cisco Umbrella, and that ManageEngine protection was disabled.
  • I clarified that the machines could now be uninstalled from the endpoints without any OTP prompts, and these changes would take effect as soon as the devices come online.

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Boston Group - Time-Sensitive Closeout Items (Reply Requested)
TimeEntry.Notes: As per the request received from Jeff Klein, we compiled a full list of all Boston Group devices currently listed in Technijian’s management portal. This includes workstations and servers, along with the logged-on users for each device, to ensure that all devices are properly tracked and managed. This list was created by reviewing and consolidating information from all Technijian portals, ensuring visibility and management coverage over all company-owned devices. This will help Boston Group maintain complete oversight and ensure proper management of their IT infrastructure. Shared the details to Jeff via email.

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Boston Group - Time-Sensitive Closeout Items (Reply Requested)
TimeEntry.Notes: Assisted to satish on the crowd-strike removal token for the BST and moved the agents on the policy.

TimeEntry.Title: crowdstrike token
TimeEntry.Notes: boston group offboarding- release the token, ask the team to check all the portals and release bST.

TimeEntry.Title: crowdstrike token
TimeEntry.Notes: grant global admin to jeff.
